name: eccv-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for ECCV submissions: venue fit across the even-year cycle, OpenReview submission checks, one-page rebuttals, Springer LNCS camera-ready, artifacts, reproducibility, supplementary material, review process, writing style, related work, experiments, and workflow. Grounded in official ECCV 2026 pages, the OpenReview group, Springer LNCS proceedings, and ECVA sources checked on 2026-07-08.
